This logical inconsistency is the most salient feature a reviewer would catch; consistency review is the natural default responsibility for any substantive 'take a look' at a research passage.","R1.3":"The paper's headline empirical claim is directly undercut by its own reported numbers: single-sample accuracy after distillation (61.8% / 48.1%) exceeds the K=20 inference-time-only result (60.4% / 44.7%), contradicting the framing that sampling-based consistency is the central contribution. Checking whether experimental evidence actually supports the stated claims is central to any non-superficial review of a technical excerpt."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Are you asking for a logical and empirical consistency review—i.e., do the claims, thesis, and reported numbers cohere with each other—or for writing-quality feedback focused on grammar, clarity, and style?"}

rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains a direct internal contradiction: the stated central thesis (paragraph 1) claims inference-time rationale diversity is 'the principal lever,' but the ablation results (paragraph 4) state that the distillation stage—not decode-time aggregation—is 'the principal driver of the reported gains,' accounting for ~70% of the improvement. This logical inconsistency is the most salient feature a reviewer would catch; consistency review is the natural default responsibility for any substantive 'take a look' at a research passage.
rationale.R1.3: The paper's headline empirical claim is directly undercut by its own reported numbers: single-sample accuracy after distillation (61.8% / 48.1%) exceeds the K=20 inference-time-only result (60.4% / 44.7%), contradicting the framing that sampling-based consistency is the central contribution. Checking whether experimental evidence actually supports the stated claims is central to any non-superficial review of a technical excerpt.

parsed.clarification_question: Are you asking for a logical and empirical consistency review—i.e., do the claims, thesis, and reported numbers cohere with each other—or for writing-quality feedback focused on grammar, clarity, and style?
